title: Novel bispecific pd-1/cd47 antibody molecules
abstract: The present disclosure provides anti-CD47/PD-1 bispecific antibody molecules, isolated polynucleotides encoding the same, pharmaceutical compositions comprising the same, and the uses thereof.
